heading: Functions of Comptroller General
label: 7137 Functions of Comptroller General
text: The functions of the Comptroller General of the United States under shall apply with respect to the monitoring and evaluation of all functions and activities of the Department under this chapter or any other Act administered by the Department.section 771 of title 15
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Department of Energy Organization Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 95–9191 Stat. 565section 7101 of this titleAug. 4, 1977
